product.name: Cordless Solstice Vinyl Roll-Up Blind - 30 Inch Width, 72 Inch Length, Quarter Inch Vinyl Slats - White - Soft Light Filtering Horizontal Windows Blinds for Indoor & Ourdoor by Achim Home Decor
product.description: Solstice Roll Up Blinds: Softly filter light in any room with the Achim Solstice Roll Up Blinds, which easily roll up to any height and are fully washable. These blinds with no cords to get tangled are child and pet safe.
features: Solstice Roll Up Blinds: Softly filter light in any room with the Achim Solstice Roll Up Blinds, which easily roll up to any height and are fully washable. These blinds with no cords to get tangled are child and pet safe.
Easy to Install: Includes all the hardware you will need with simple instructions to make installation easy and convenient! Good for inside or outside mount and indoor or outdoor use.
How to Use: Whether you want to filter out light or take in the view, simply roll the bottom of the shade up or down and fasten with the included strap.
Find the Perfect Fit: Comes in grey, woodtone, and white and plenty of sizes so you’re sure to find the perfect fit for your home.

Bringing Great Designs Home: Achim Home Decor has been bringing fashion and value to your home since 1962. Specializing in decorative window and floor styles, we pride ourselves on offering outstanding value with the highest quality standards.
